name: Mystery Hotel: Hidden Objects
short_description: 🔍 Solve the mystery behind a shocking murder at Hotel Noir! 🕵️‍♂️ Search for hidden objects, uncover clues, and piece together the truth. But remember... trust no one!
detailed_description:
🕵️ Step Into the Shoes of a Detective

Unravel the chilling mystery behind the walls of Hotel Noir, a once-peaceful retreat hidden in the highlands of Western Europe. Your arrival is quickly overshadowed by a shocking murder, and only you can uncover the truth.

🔍 Investigate, Interrogate, Trust No One

Dive into a classic detective adventure where every clue matters. Explore richly detailed environments, question suspicious characters, and piece together the evidence. Be careful who you believe, nothing is quite as it seems.

🎨 A Visual Feast for Mystery Lovers

Immerse yourself in colorful, hand-crafted scenes, smooth animations, and eye-catching 3D effects that bring the story to life. Whether you're solving puzzles or chasing leads, every moment is filled with atmosphere and intrigue.

🧩 Features That Keep You Coming Back

• Variety of gameplay including hidden object scenes, spot-the-difference challenges, logical puzzles, and object restoration
• Replayable scenes with new quests and collectible rewards
• Flexible experience with no time limits, plus bonus rewards for speed and accuracy

Ready to Crack the Case?

If you love immersive storytelling, clever puzzles, and atmospheric mysteries, Hotel Noir is calling. Sharpen your instincts, trust no one, and uncover what really happened.

Start your investigation today! The truth won’t wait.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese
